label: Who We Are
heading: Crafting Beauty with Passion & Precision
para1: Natural Beauty Clinic and Academy is Kathmandu's trusted destination for premium beauty services and professional beauty education. Located in the heart of New Baneshwor, we blend Korean-inspired skincare philosophy with global beauty techniques.
para2: From transformative bridal packages to certified academy programs, our expert team is dedicated to enhancing your natural beauty while empowering the next generation of beauty professionals in Nepal.
years_label: Years of Professional Excellence in Kathmandu
owner_title: Owner · Senior Beautician · CTEVT Assessor · 20+ Years Experience
